groups.label: expanding
groups.description: Paper-protocol expanding context, vehicle_then_aquarium direction, random ordering #8.

sentences.text: Urban warfare doctrine recommends that infantry always accompany the tank to guard against close-range threats.

Urban warfare doctrine recommends that infantry always accompany the tank to guard against close-range threats. Satellite imagery revealed a freshly dug revetment designed to conceal one tank from aerial observation.

Urban warfare doctrine recommends that infantry always accompany the tank to guard against close-range threats. Satellite imagery revealed a freshly dug revetment designed to conceal one tank from aerial observation. Smoke grenade launchers mounted on the turret allow the tank to create an instant concealment screen.

Urban warfare doctrine recommends that infantry always accompany the tank to guard against close-range threats. Satellite imagery revealed a freshly dug revetment designed to conceal one tank from aerial observation. Smoke grenade launchers mounted on the turret allow the tank to create an instant concealment screen. Dust clouds trailed behind the tank as it barreled across the open steppe at full throttle.

Urban warfare doctrine recommends that infantry always accompany the tank to guard against close-range threats. Satellite imagery revealed a freshly dug revetment designed to conceal one tank from aerial observation. Smoke grenade launchers mounted on the turret allow the tank to create an instant concealment screen. Dust clouds trailed behind the tank as it barreled across the open steppe at full throttle. Modular armor kits allow field crews to reconfigure the tank protection level depending on the threat environment.

Urban warfare doctrine recommends that infantry always accompany the tank to guard against close-range threats. Satellite imagery revealed a freshly dug revetment designed to conceal one tank from aerial observation. Smoke grenade launchers mounted on the turret allow the tank to create an instant concealment screen. Dust clouds trailed behind the tank as it barreled across the open steppe at full throttle. Modular armor kits allow field crews to reconfigure the tank protection level depending on the threat environment. An enemy rocket struck the side armor of the tank but failed to penetrate the hull.

Urban warfare doctrine recommends that infantry always accompany the tank to guard against close-range threats. Satellite imagery revealed a freshly dug revetment designed to conceal one tank from aerial observation. Smoke grenade launchers mounted on the turret allow the tank to create an instant concealment screen. Dust clouds trailed behind the tank as it barreled across the open steppe at full throttle. Modular armor kits allow field crews to reconfigure the tank protection level depending on the threat environment. An enemy rocket struck the side armor of the tank but failed to penetrate the hull. The logistics officer calculated how many rail cars would be needed to transport every tank in the brigade.

Modular armor kits allow field crews to reconfigure the tank protection level depending on the threat environment. An enemy rocket struck the side armor of the tank but failed to penetrate the hull. The logistics officer calculated how many rail cars would be needed to transport every tank in the brigade. My cousin showed me around the military base and we got to sit inside a real tank.

The logistics officer calculated how many rail cars would be needed to transport every tank in the brigade. My cousin showed me around the military base and we got to sit inside a real tank. A recovery vehicle towed the immobilized tank back to the repair depot behind the front lines.

Urban warfare doctrine recommends that infantry always accompany the tank to guard against close-range threats. A recovery vehicle towed the immobilized tank back to the repair depot behind the front lines. The lieutenant climbed out of the tank and surveyed the landscape through a pair of field glasses.

Urban warfare doctrine recommends that infantry always accompany the tank to guard against close-range threats. During the liberation, the townspeople draped flowers and flags over the hull of the first allied tank to arrive.

Urban warfare doctrine recommends that infantry always accompany the tank to guard against close-range threats. Satellite imagery revealed a freshly dug revetment designed to conceal one tank from aerial observation. Smoke grenade launchers mounted on the turret allow the tank to create an instant concealment screen. Dust clouds trailed behind the tank as it barreled across the open steppe at full throttle. Modular armor kits allow field crews to reconfigure the tank protection level depending on the threat environment. An enemy rocket struck the side armor of the tank but failed to penetrate the hull. The logistics officer calculated how many rail cars would be needed to transport every tank in the brigade. My cousin showed me around the military base and we got to sit inside a real tank. A recovery vehicle towed the immobilized tank back to the repair depot behind the front lines. The lieutenant climbed out of the tank and surveyed the landscape through a pair of field glasses. During the liberation, the townspeople draped flowers and flags over the hull of the first allied tank to arrive. Sandbags and razor wire surrounded the tank that served as a checkpoint along the main road.

During the liberation, the townspeople draped flowers and flags over the hull of the first allied tank to arrive. Composite armor arrays on modern main battle platforms give the tank superior protection against shaped charges.

During the liberation, the townspeople draped flowers and flags over the hull of the first allied tank to arrive. My daughter named every single fish in the tank and gets upset if we mix them up. Colorful guppies chased each other through the bubbling water of the brightly lit tank. A pair of seahorses clung to the artificial seagrass inside the tall narrow tank by the entrance. She poured the dechlorinated water slowly into the tank so the current would not disturb the fry. The filtration system hummed quietly behind the tank while the fish settled in for the night. I swear this betta fish recognizes me every time I walk up to the tank to feed him. Water trickled softly from the overflow box at the back of the tank into the sump below.

Somebody posted a video of a tank getting stuck in a ditch and needing another one to pull it out. The fire control system allows the tank to engage targets accurately while moving at full speed. The scout spotted an enemy tank concealed beneath camouflage netting at the edge of the forest. Modular armor kits allow field crews to reconfigure the tank protection level depending on the threat environment. An enemy rocket struck the side armor of the tank but failed to penetrate the hull. My daughter named every single fish in the tank and gets upset if we mix them up. Colorful guppies chased each other through the bubbling water of the brightly lit tank. A pair of seahorses clung to the artificial seagrass inside the tall narrow tank by the entrance. She poured the dechlorinated water slowly into the tank so the current would not disturb the fry. The filtration system hummed quietly behind the tank while the fish settled in for the night. I swear this betta fish recognizes me every time I walk up to the tank to feed him. Water trickled softly from the overflow box at the back of the tank into the sump below. CO2 injection at two bubbles per second promotes vigorous plant growth in a high-tech planted tank.
